lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: 'tis a fine day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem to be in a good mood.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Aye! I be the last o' me crew! Not even our ship left now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't seem like a reason to be happy...

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Well, it means I be the winner!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So what happened to your crew?

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: It be a series o' bad luck! First, Bill, the lookout, collided with an albatross in the crows nest 'n took a tumble overboard.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Finally, the Cap'n sank the Snake Eyes sailin' north out o' Catherby.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... Well, congratulations on having survived all that. All the best.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Aye! 'til next time.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: 'tis a fine day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem to be in a good mood.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Aye! I be the last o' me crew! Not even our ship left now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't seem like a reason to be happy...

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Well, it means I be the winner!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So what happened to your crew?

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: It be a series o' bad luck! First, Bill, the lookout, collided with an albatross in the crows nest 'n took a tumble overboard.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Then the ship's cook got squashed by a crate o' hard tack. Salty Robbie took a drunken nap in the bilge water 'bout the same time.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Finally, the Cap'n sank the Snake Eyes sailin' north out o' Catherby.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... Well, congratulations on having survived all that. What do you plan to do now?

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Well, I guess I be lookin' fer a new opportunity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself, but I'm not really ready for that yet.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Well, ye' know where t' find me when ye' are.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: 'tis a fine day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again. How are things going?

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Aye, they be mighty good, but I'm still lookin' fer a new opportunity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself, but I'm not really ready for that yet.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Well, ye' know where t' find me when ye' are.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: 'tis a fine day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem to be in a good mood.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Aye! I be the last o' me crew! Not even our ship left now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't seem like a reason to be happy...

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Well, it means I be the winner!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So what happened to your crew?

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: It be a series o' bad luck! First, Bill, the lookout, collided with an albatross in the crows nest 'n took a tumble overboard.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Then the ship's cook got squashed by a crate o' hard tack. Salty Robbie took a drunken nap in the bilge water 'bout the same time.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Finally, the Cap'n sank the Snake Eyes sailin' north out o' Catherby.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... Well, congratulations on having survived all that. What do you plan to do now?

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Well, I guess I be lookin' fer a new opportunity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about you join my crew?

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Hmm... Nay, me hearty. I be thinkin' ye'd be the end o' me lucky streak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about you join my crew?

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Aye, I'm ready to take another roll o' the dice!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, good luck with it.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: Aye! 'til next time.

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: There's been a worrying lack o' sinkin' lately, Cap'n. Worried it's affectin' the crew's morale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't make much sense to me...

lines.speaker: Jolly Jim
lines.text: How're we supposed to score some free grog at the bar when we got no stories to be tellin'!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry... I'll try to do worse, I guess.
